name: Fake taxi
description:
🚖 FAKE TAXI

You're a fake taxi driver. No license, no credentials, just a car and a meter that keeps running. Your passengers? Girls from every anime, game, manga, comic, and franchise you can think of. They need a ride. They don't have money. They'll figure something out.
